Leverage & scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 9 --

What is “Leverage”?
▪ 	“Small hinges swing big doors”
▪ 	What small tweaks can you make that can create a big
impact without you putting in a lot of extra time?
▪ 	Financial leverage
▪ 	Time leverage
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 9 --

What is “Scale”?
▪ 	Where can your business grow?
▪ 	Fasttrack (mutual fund analysis software subscription)
would never scale
▪ 	PLF will scale
▪ 	…but not the way Google (or weight loss) scales
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 9 --

How Leverage and Scale are intertwined
▪ 	Many of the things that give you leverage, will allow you
to scale
▪ 	Many of the things that allow you to scale, will also give
you leverage
▪ 	They’re not the same, but they’re very intertwined
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 9 --

What do you want to Scale? or Leverage?
▪ 	Plat Plus - the dollars don’t really scale, but the impact on
the business does
▪ 	Don’t focus on the dollars when looking at scale/leverage
▪ 	Focus on your “unique ability”
▪ 	Focus on doing what you love and making your life
awesome
